{{Quote|Minimal is maximal.|Vanar|<ref name="Star Wars: Union">''[[Star Wars: Union]]''</ref>}}
'''Vanar''' was a fashion designer contacted to design a wedding dress for [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade's]] wedding to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. He believed in the philosophy that "[[minimal is maximal]]" and his skimpy dresses reflected this. Mara rejected his dresses, but found an answer in Vanar's employee, [[Jari'kyn]]. Vanar knew Mara would like Jari'kyn's designs, so he fired her.

==Appearances==
*[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] {{1st}}
